steps.title: Compare career starts
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize when each lighthouse keeper began her career. Nora Whitfield began in 1834, while Clara J. Morgan began in 1883.

steps.title: Avoid end dates or background
steps.content: A gives background without career start order, C compares end dates, and D contradicts the notes by placing both keepers in Maryland during 1834-1857. The matching choice states that Morgan began years after Whitfield. The answer is B.
